security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.longDescription: Client-only personal & family health record: profiles, goals, vitals tracking, daily habits, medical-document import, reminders. No backend; data stays on your device.
